---
title: "Assignment_2"
output: html_document
---





data would be n number of trials, and h choices.


```{r}





```



```{r}
# Biased Model
stan_model <- "

data {
  int <lower=1> n;
  array[n] <lower=0, upper=1> h;
}

params {
 real <lower=0, upper=1> theta;
}


model{
  target += beta_lpdf(theta | 1, 1); 
  target += bernoulli_lpmf(h | theta)
}


"
```


```{r}

beta_model <- "

data {
  int <lower=1> n;
  array[n] <lower=0, upper=1> h;
  array[n] <lower=0, upper=1> other;
}

params {
  real <lower=0, upper=inf> alpha;
  real <lower=0, upper=inf> beta;
}

trial params {
  array[n] alpha;
  array[n] beta;
  array[n] theta;

 // Initial values?
  alpha[1] = alpha
  beta[1] = beta
  theta[1] = alpha/(alpha + beta)

 // Updating on trial basis 
  for (t in 2:n) {
    alpha[n] = alpha[n-1] + other[n-1]
    beta[n] = beta[n-1] + (1-other[n-1])
    theta[n] = alpha[n]/(alpha[n] + beta[n])
  }

}

model{

  target += 
  target += 
  
  for(t in 1:n) {
    target += bernoulli_lpmf(h[t] | theta[t]);
  }
  
}

generated quantities{


}


" 






```
